{{Quote|He wath not vewwy bwight, my nephew.|Avaro Sookcool, in regards to [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]|<ref name="Shadows of the Empire (novel)" />}}
'''Avaro Sookcool''' was an obese [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was the uncle of [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] and spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] albeit with a lisp.

==Biography==
He owned [[Flip of the Credit]], a small [[Casino/Legends|casino]] in [[Equator City/Legends|Equator City]] on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. As his small casino was part of a larger complex operated by the part of the cartel that was dedicated to money-laundering, Avaro was an operative for [[Clezo]], the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]]. Clezo, however, did not know that Avaro reported to [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] himself as well as to him. 

Avaro survived [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red's]] [[Tetsu Clan]] purges because of his ties to Black Sun, which Navik did not dare to cross.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

When [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] needed some ties to Black Sun in rescuing the captured [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and also to learn who wanted [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] dead, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] thought of Avaro as a contact. They met in his office. Despite Greedo having been killed by Han, he held no grudge.<Ref>{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=It'th Greedo'th Uncle|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC023.jpg}}</ref> Eventually he arranged for them a meeting with [[Guri]].

{{Char-stub}}
